# Walz Travels

> Walz Travels is a global travel and visa consultancy serving the African diaspora across Canada, United Kingdom, UAE, Nigeria and Ghana.

## About

THE WALZ TRAVELS INC is incorporated in Ontario, Canada. Founded by Olawale Seyi Omobobola. Operating across six international markets.

## Services

- Visa processing: UK, Canada, UAE, Schengen, USA and 190+ destinations
- Flight bookings — IATA registered
- Hotel reservations worldwide
- Private tours: Niagara Falls, London, Dubai, Paris, Dublin
- Travel insurance
- Airport transfers globally
- Jade Connect eSIM — 150+ countries
- AI trip planning via Jade

## Pricing

- UK visa from USD $188
- Canada visa from USD $281
- UAE visa from USD $470
- Schengen visa from USD $231
- USA visa from USD $344

Canada, United Kingdom, United Arab Emirates, Nigeria, Ghana

## FAQ

Q: What is Walz Travels' UK visa approval rate?
A: Walz Travels achieves a 90%+ approval rate on UK visa applications for Nigerian and Ghanaian clients.

Q: Can I book flights and visa together?
A: Yes. Walz Travels handles both flight bookings and visa applications in one package.

Q: How long does UK visa processing take?
A: Standard: 3 weeks. Priority: 5 working days. Super Priority: next working day. Walz Travels manages the full process for you.

Q: What currencies do you accept?
A: GBP, NGN, CAD, AED via Stripe and Flutterwave.

Q: Is there a payment plan for flights?
A: Yes. Walz Travels offers instalment booking. Contact via WhatsApp: +447398753797.

Q: What is the Schengen Area?
A: 29 European countries with no internal border controls. One Schengen visa lets you visit all of them.

Q: Which is the easiest Schengen country for Nigerians to apply through?
A: France and Portugal tend to have higher approval rates for Nigerian applicants. Walz Travels advises on country selection.
